name: comment-translate-cloudflare
description: A Cloudflare AI translation source for comment-translate

cloudflareTranslate.accountId.description: Cloudflare Account ID used for Workers AI API requests.

cloudflareTranslate.apiToken.description: Cloudflare API Token with Workers AI permissions.
cloudflareTranslate.apiToken.markdownDescription: Cloudflare API Token with Workers AI permissions. It is recommended to store this in VS Code Secret Storage-aware sync settings if available.

cloudflareTranslate.model.description: Workers AI model name, for example @cf/meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct.

cloudflareTranslate.systemPrompt.default: You are a translation assistant. Return only translated text.
cloudflareTranslate.systemPrompt.description: Optional system prompt for controlling translation style and behavior.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
